response.justification: Strong individual contributor background with 13+ years of software development, but the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no management titles, and no evidence of leading developer-tools/build/test infrastructure teams. The role explicitly requires 2 years of people management and 3 years building developer tools as a focus area, neither of which is demonstrated. Workshop and training experience shows leadership aptitude but does not substitute for engineering management track record.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot full-stack and systems experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Strong testing/TDD craftsmanship background with tooling contributions (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup)
Teaching and workshop delivery (Selenium course, Web Internals, Refactoring Dojos) signals mentorship capability
concerns: No people-management or team-lead title in employment history; missing the required 2 years managing engineers
Developer-tools experience is incidental rather than a 3-year focused track in compilers/build systems/test automation at scale
No mobile-platform ecosystem leadership; mobile work limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016

key_factors.factor: Deep IC technical breadth and testing/tooling craftsmanship
